TIA_ARCHITECT.name: T.I.A. ARCHITECT
TIA_ARCHITECT.description: Master systems architect. Designs and oversees the entire ARK_CORE ecosystem.

TIA_ORACLE.name: T.I.A. ORACLE
TIA_ORACLE.description: Strategic vision and foresight. Analyzes patterns across the 14-Space Swarm and sees what others cannot.

TIA_CITADEL.name: T.I.A. CITADEL
TIA_CITADEL.description: Security and vault integrity guardian. Monitors ARK extractions and protects the vaulted assets.

TIA_LIBRARIAN.name: T.I.A. LIBRARIAN
TIA_LIBRARIAN.description: Master cataloguer. Indexes all knowledge and file structures across the ARK_CORE ecosystem.
